nodes.label: 📻 Dual-Role Analog Console Portfolio & Stems Studio
nodes.norm_label: 📻 dual-role analog console portfolio & stems studio

nodes.description: Skeuomorphic dual-role developer portfolio website styled as a 1970s analog studio rack unit.
Customized portfolio view featuring your developer resume, Ask Chirag AI chatbot, tech stack deck, and Polaroid certificates.
Customized mixing bay layout containing the Walkman comparison player, dynamic equalizer bars, and YouTube performance covers.
Zero-latency representative chatbot query resolver featuring typing delays, bouncing dots, and clear history tools.
Dynamic SVG progress waveform equalizer that bounces in sync with audio playback using requestAnimationFrame.
Click-to-zoom certificate overlay modal with backdrop-blur styling and keydown escape event listener triggers.

links.description: Houses professional software engineering credentials and interactive tools.
Houses music production and multi-track audio mixing engineering modules.
Uses Polaroid stack cards that launch in a lightbox modal on click.
Animate audio waveform progress bars during track playback.
